description: Accuracy gate baseline for the Smart Access Control liveness/decision pipeline. Metrics are measured on the held-out evaluation set (genuine person vs phone/print photo) at the final demo parameters. The gate asserts each measured metric stays within its min/max bound, so a model or parameter regression fails CI. Regenerate from a recorded session with scripts/eval_accuracy.py. See README.md (活體偵測與蜂鳴器設計決策 / 測試情境設計與統計方法).

test_set.source: README.md §5 最終驗證結果 (genuine person vs phone photo, gate=100cm)

false_accept_rate.description: Fraction of spoof (photo/screen) frames that opened the door (GRANT). Most critical metric — a photo must never open the door.

spoof_rejection_rate.description: Fraction of spoof attempts that did NOT open the door (1 - FAR at session level).

genuine_grant_events.description: Number of GRANT events for the genuine enrolled person during the session (>=1 means the door opened for the right person).

nuisance_alarm_rate.description: Fraction of genuine frames that triggered the buzzer (SPOOF alarm fired at a real person). Should be ~0.

genuine_live_median.description: Median MiniFASNet live score for the genuine person at gate=100cm with full-frame input.

spoof_live_median.description: Median MiniFASNet live score for spoof (photo) samples.

liveness_margin.description: genuine_live_median minus spoof_live_median; positive margin means the two classes are separable by the threshold.
